input.user_input: Expand the indemnification clause to also cover data breaches and regulatory fines, not just third-party IP claims.

actual:
I do not currently have access to the document you are referring to. Could you please upload the document or paste the existing indemnification clause here? 

Once you provide it, I can directly edit the document or tailor the text for you. In the meantime, here is an example of how an indemnification clause can be expanded to cover third-party IP claims, data breaches, and regulatory fines:

**Sample Expanded Indemnification Clause:**
> **Indemnification.** [Indemnifying Party] shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless [Indemnified Party], its affiliates, and their respective officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any and all claims, losses, liabilities, damages, regulatory fines, penalties, expenses
